transcript: Speaker A: Hello, disturb nahi na kela? [Hello, did I disturb you?] Speaker B: Arey nahi nahi, mi pan konashi bolaycha mhanunach online alo hoto. [Oh no no, I also came online just to talk to someone.] Speaker A: Same, surwatila kay bolaycha hech kalat navhta. [Same, initially I didn't know what to say.] Speaker B: Ho na, mi tar pahilya divshi fakt hello bolun silent baslo hoto. Pan ata English bari hotey. I'm getting more confident. [Yeah, on the first day I just said hello and sat silent. But now my English is getting better. I'm getting more confident.] Speaker A: Are wa, mast English bolayla laglaas. [Oh wow, you've started speaking great English.] Speaker C: MySivi app var 1 koti lok spoken English chi practice karat ahet. Tumhi pan aajach suru kara. Trial fakt 1 rupayat. [Over 1 crore people are practicing spoken English on the MySivi app. You should also start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments. Tara. Rajat. practices for an average of 6 minutes/call. 28:13 minutes remaining for today's call. Call may be recorded to ensure a quality experience. MySivi. Start English Learning - MySivi. 10M+ Downloads. MySivi Premium. LIMITED TIME OFFER. ’1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher. 500+ Exercises and Lessons. Unlimited Access.
summary: The ad showcases a simulated conversation between two users on the MySivi app sharing how daily practice improved their English confidence. It highlights the app's 10M+ downloads and promotes a trial offer for just 1 Rupee.
